name: 主机资产核心模板
description: 采集授权主机的主机、系统、用户、进程、监听端口、软件、计划任务、启动项、内核模块和关键文件哈希，用于资产画像与基线审计。
safe_scope: 仅用于授权主机或 demo 数据。不要采集浏览器历史、私钥、令牌、个人文件内容或绕权数据。

queries.host: SELECT hostname, uuid, cpu_brand, cpu_physical_cores, physical_memory FROM system_info;
queries.system: SELECT name, version, major, minor, build, platform FROM os_version;
queries.users: SELECT username, uid, gid, directory, shell, type FROM users WHERE username NOT LIKE '_%' ORDER BY uid LIMIT 100;
queries.processes: SELECT pid, name, path, state, parent, uid FROM processes ORDER BY pid LIMIT 200;
queries.ports: SELECT pid, port, protocol, address FROM listening_ports ORDER BY port LIMIT 200;
queries.software: SELECT name, version, source FROM apps ORDER BY name LIMIT 200;
queries.scheduled_tasks: SELECT event, command, path FROM crontab ORDER BY path, event LIMIT 200;
queries.startup_items: SELECT name, path, type, status FROM startup_items ORDER BY name LIMIT 200;
queries.kernel_modules: SELECT name, path, size, status FROM kernel_modules ORDER BY name LIMIT 200;
queries.file_hashes: SELECT path, sha256 FROM hash WHERE path IN ('/etc/hosts', '/etc/passwd', '/etc/ssh/sshd_config') ORDER BY path;
